query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                        SELECT 1 FROM leave_requests lr
                        JOIN leave_request_lines lrl ON lrl.leave_request_id = lr.id
                        WHERE lr.user_id = $1
                          AND lr.status IN ('pending', 'approved')
                          AND lr.org_id = $2
                          AND lrl.date = $3
                          AND (
                            lrl.start_time IS NULL
                            OR $4::TIME IS NULL
                            OR $5::TIME IS NULL
                            OR (lrl.start_time < $5::TIME AND lrl.end_time > $4::TIME)
                          )
                        FOR UPDATE OF lr
                    )
